name: The Mist Room
description: A cozy and comfortable room with a large window framing the city. Ideal for solo travelers and couples looking for a peaceful escape.

name: The Pine Suite
description: Wider space, upgraded furnishings, and a balcony-facing layout that lets the pine-framed cityscape pour into your room morning and night.

name: The Ledge Suite
description: Our flagship room. Spacious, stylishly furnished, with direct access to the main viewing deck. Best for anniversaries and special celebrations.
